resources.string: A motivated UIT student passionate about mobile apps, product development, and data-driven solutions.

I am Nguyễn Bảo Châu, a student at the University of Information Technology – VNUHCM. I am interested in mobile application development, business analysis, product development, and data-driven solutions. I enjoy building practical applications that solve real user problems and improve user experience.
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

• Android / Mobile Development
• Java / Kotlin
• UI/UX Design
• Backend/API Integration
• Data Analysis
• Business Analysis
• Teamwork / Communication
IELTS Speaking Practice mobile app with speaking practice for three parts, voice recording, result evaluation, vocabulary flashcards, and ranking.
Virtual fitting and digital wardrobe platform that supports virtual try-on and outfit recommendation.
Business Development Intern at Yoga Agency
First Prize at Advanced Information System Contest 2025
